ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the game was played */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the game was played */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the game was played */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team playing */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opposing team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (H for home, V for visitor) */,
  "team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the team */,
  "opponent_score" INTEGER /* Score of the opponent */,
  "OT" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  "D1" INTEGER /* Division of the game (e.g., 1 for NCAA Division 1) */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time the game started */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary referee */,
  "umpire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary umpire */,
  "tv_coverage" INTEGER /* Whether the game had TV coverage */,
  "audience_ratings" REAL /* Audience ratings if the game was televised */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_umpire_id FOREIGN KEY ("umpire_id") REFERENCES officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division of the team (e.g., NCAA Division 1) */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary team color */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Team's Twitter handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Player's hometown */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* Player's high school */,
  "college_year" TEXT /* Player's current college year (e.g., Freshman, Sophomore) */,
  "jersey_color" TEXT /* Player's jersey color */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the player's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Coach's date of birth */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Coach's hometown */,
  "education" TEXT /* Coach's educational background */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the coach's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "points_scored" INTEGER /* Number of points scored by the player */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Number of rebounds by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Number of steals by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Number of turnovers by the player */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the schedule entry belongs to */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, postponed, canceled) */,
  "attendance_capacity" INTEGER /* Expected attendance capacity */,
  "ticket_sales" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold */,
  "gate_revenue" REAL /* Revenue from gate sales */,
  "tv_coverage" INTEGER /* Whether the game will have TV coverage */,
  "audience_ratings" REAL /* Expected audience ratings if the game is televised */,
  "weather_forecast" TEXT /* Weather forecast for the game day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the official belongs to */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Name of the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., Referee, Umpire) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Official's date of birth */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Official's hometown */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of officiating experience */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the official's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officials_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the schedule entry the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., schedule update, venue change) */,
  "recipient_type" TEXT /* Type of recipient (e.g., team, official, staff) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_schedule_id FOREIGN KEY ("schedule_id") REFERENCES schedules ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Coach, Athletic Director, Analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_logout" TEXT /* Date and time of the last logout */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* User's access level (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the user accessed the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser or application */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the analytics entry belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the analytics entry belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the analytics entry belongs to */,
  "statistic" TEXT /* Statistic being measured (e.g., points per game, rebounds per game) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "game_quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the game (1, 2, 3, 4, OT1, OT2, etc.) */,
  "time_of_game" TEXT /* Time within the game when the statistic was recorded */,
  "statistic_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., points, rebounds, assists) */,
  "value_type" TEXT /* Type of value (e.g., per game, per minute, per possession) */,
  "calculated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the statistic was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
